overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a neon-lit urban downtown. The player character walks along wet sidewalks beneath elevated highways, passing futuristic buildings with holographic advertisements and sparse pedestrian traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: street corner with crosswalk and neon hotel signage

events.description: begins walking forward from the street corner onto the sidewalk
enters covered area beneath the elevated highway structure

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk from a street corner, approaching pedestrians and entering a covered area

notable_agents.action: two pedestrians standing at the corner near the crosswalk

entered.detail: broad yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing with 'No Future' text
illuminated hotel signage with bright yellow text reading 'HOTEL'
large screen displaying animated advertisement with a woman's face
tall black pole with traffic signals and street lighting

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a neon-lit street corner with a prominent yellow crosswalk. The player walks forward past pedestrians standing near the crossing, with a large digital billboard visible on the right. As the player progresses, they enter the shadow of an elevated highway overpass, transitioning from open sky to a more enclosed space.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered sidewalk beneath elevated highway with red lanterns

events.description: ambient light dims significantly under the overpass with red lantern glow becoming prominent
vehicle passes by on the street to the left under the overpass

agents.ego_description: continuing straight under the elevated highway structure, passing orange safety railings and concrete barriers

entered.detail: massive concrete highway structure spanning overhead with support columns
string of red spherical paper lanterns hanging from the overpass
bright orange metal safety barriers separating sidewalk from street

segments.scene_description: Walking beneath the massive elevated highway overpass, the environment becomes darker and more enclosed. Red lanterns hang overhead providing ambient light, while orange guardrails line the left side of the path. The area is devoid of pedestrians, with only occasional vehicles passing on the street below the overpass.

scene_state.functional_zone: open city street with parked vehicles and neon storefronts

events.description: exits the covered overpass area back into the open street with visible sky
white sports car passes by on the street to the left

agents.ego_description: walking along the open sidewalk, passing parked cars and approaching other pedestrians in the distance

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead on the sidewalk in the same direction

entered.detail: white two-door sports car parked along the curb with glowing taillights
commercial building with bright pink and cyan neon signage
metal pipe railings along the edge of the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Emerging from under the overpass, the scene opens up to a wider street with parked vehicles and neon-lit storefronts visible in the distance. The player walks past a white sports car parked on the right, following a pedestrian ahead. Street railings line the left side as traffic occasionally passes by on the wet asphalt.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching building entrance with vertical neon signage and crosswalk

events.description: slight turn to the right while continuing forward toward building entrance
approaching well-lit building entrance with bright vertical signage

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk past a pedestrian with colorful attire, approaching a building entrance with bright lighting

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with pink hair and colorful outfit walking toward the camera

entered.detail: illuminated glass doorway with overhead lighting and architectural details
tall vertical light fixture with bright white fluorescent tubes
yellow zebra crossing lines on the pavement ahead

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the approach to a building entrance marked by bright vertical neon lights. The player passes a distinctive pedestrian with pink hair and colorful clothing walking in the opposite direction. The sidewalk leads toward a crosswalk and the illuminated entrance, with the urban canyon of buildings rising on both sides.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a bright, neon-lit street corner through the oppressive shadow of an overpass and back into a vibrant urban canyon. It begins at a yellow crosswalk beneath a large digital billboard, moving past pedestrians before the sky vanishes as the camera enters the enclosure of a massive elevated highway. As the environment darkens, the scene shifts to a secluded path lit by red lanterns and lined with orange guardrails, where the bustle of the city fades into the sound of distant traffic. The camera then emerges from the overpass into a wider street, passing a white sports car and following a pedestrian along wet asphalt toward glowing storefronts. Finally, the path leads toward a building entrance marked by bright vertical neon lights, passing a colorful pedestrian with pink hair as the towering city architecture closes in on both sides.
